tactics.title: 🚀 4-Step Strategy to Increase Client Bookings by 40%
tactics.summary: Follow this proven BlueX provider growth blueprint tailored to Swiss service markets:
actionPoints: 1. ⚡ **Keep Response Time Under 15 Mins**: 75% of Swiss customers hire the first qualified provider who responds.
2. 📜 **Verify Documents via OCR**: Verified badges increase customer trust and search priority by 3x.
3. 📸 **Showcase High Quality Project Photos**: Real Swiss before/after photos increase profile conversion from 8% to 22%.
4. 💬 **Respond Promptly to Public Tenders**: Submit itemized cost estimates within 2 hours of a tender posting.
